name: Should I tell my lawyer I'm worried about their ChatGPT use?

mainEntity.name: Should I tell my lawyer I'm worried about their ChatGPT use?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, communicate concerns immediately. Context: Builds trust, ensures verification; ethics favor transparency. Key factors: Your consent rights, work quality. Practical guidance: Email specifics, request human-only drafts, monitor bills. Switch if unsatisfied.
